name: Sata Andagi (Okinawan Doughnuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a skillet to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, beat the eggs, milk, and vanilla.
3. Sift together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
4. Add the sifted dry ingredients to the egg mixture; stir until well combined and smooth.
5. Drop spoonfuls of dough into the hot oil.
6. Fry until golden brown and the doughnuts rise to the surface.
Makes 4 dozen.
